videos.title: Dartmoor Classic | Devon’s premier road cycling sportive
videos.description:
The Dartmoor Classic Sportive offers some of Devon’s finest road cycling, leading riders high up onto the moor by a choice of beautiful routes.

Organised and run by the Mid-Devon Cycling Club, the event is open to 4000 cyclists, making it the largest cycling challenge in the South West of England. Established in 2007, the Dartmoor Classic quickly gained a reputation for being one of the best cycle sportives in the UK and attracts riders from around the world.

Featuring the hard working crew and volunteers that organise this amazing sportive, spectacular Dartmoor landscapes and thousands of keen cyclists, this is the 10th anniversary event held in June 2016. 

https://www.dartmoorclassic.co.uk

Filmed and edited by Carrie Hill
Soigneur/Production Assistant: Dave Henderson
Timelapse photography: Jon Crawford
Aerial footage: Lena Video with Skyflicks Media
Additional cameras: John Fitzsimons and Cineon Productions
Sound Mixer: Andrew Jarrett

Thank you for watching.

© Carrie Hill Films 2016

🚴🏻‍♂️ To see more cycling in Devon with one of the county’s legends you might like to watch https://youtu.be/O8h7kigZF-A
